content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added candidate dead cell collection (neighbors of living cells that aren't alive) and brought any candidate with exactly 3 live neighbors to life.
- Result: All tests now pass (7 passing, 1 todo)
- Approach: Minimal addition to existing logic - kept the survival loop intact, then added a separate pass for dead-cell reproduction by collecting neighbor candidates and applying the rule of 3.
